fields.Name: T03 - Application Switcher
fields.Description: Uses the application switcher to navigate from Home to Data Explorer, then to AI application, then back to Home. Validates that all three applications load correctly.

InputDefinition.goal:
IMPORTANT ENVIRONMENT NOTE: This application runs in a resource-constrained Docker environment and may take 10-30 seconds to load pages, initialize the workspace, or complete navigation transitions. If you see a loading screen, spinner, or blank page — DO NOT navigate away, go back, refresh, or retry login. Simply wait with increasing intervals (5s, then 10s, then 15s) until the content appears. The application WILL load; it just needs time. Only request judgement if you have waited over 60 seconds total on the same loading state with no change.

Use the application switcher (the dropdown or sidebar that lists available applications) to navigate between applications. First, switch from the Home application to Data Explorer and confirm it loads. Then switch to the AI application and confirm it loads. Finally, switch back to the Home application. Verify each application displays its own content when active.

judgeValidationCriteria: Data Explorer content was visible at some point
AI application content was visible at some point
